race.comment: Metro-trained CISCO (6) brings strong form to resumption. Had an excuse as favourite at Ballarat when last seen and impressed in a recent Flemington jumpout. Has been gelded and will use the inside gate to advantage. Looks ready to go and is well-placed in country grade. HE'S A HUSTLER (8) resumed from a spell with a sound second over 1170m at Wangaratta. Has won a Flemington jumpout since and has two key gear additions. In good hands and can threaten. SILVER SNOW (3) resumed here over 1100m beaten just 1.3L. Settled back and finished it off well. He has more to give and deserves consideration on an each-way basis. BUZITUP (2) resumes and has ability. Spoiled things with slow starts last preparation and will be looking to sit closer from an inside gate. Keep onside.
